hero_tagline: Welcome to our hidden riad in Asilah's medina
hero_subtitle: An authentic Moroccan experience in the heart of the blue city
about_body: Nestled in the blue-and-white alleyways of Asilah, our riad is a sanctuary of peace and Moroccan tradition. Lovingly restored by the Benali family, every room tells a story of local craftsmanship and warm hospitality. We have spent years collecting Berber furniture, handcrafted zellige tiles, and woven rugs to create a space that honors Moroccan heritage while providing all modern comforts.
about_body2: Asilah is a pearl on the Atlantic coast — an artist's paradise with mural-adorned walls, galleries, and music festivals. Here, time slows down. We invite our guests to experience authentic medina life, from the bustling souk to the tranquil sunsets on the beach.
rooms_description: Each room is thoughtfully furnished with local materials and an eye for detail.
gallery_description: Explore our riad, the alleyways of Asilah, and the breathtaking coastal landscapes.
experience_medina_desc: Get lost in the mural-adorned alleyways and discover hidden treasures of the old city.
experience_beach_desc: Enjoy the pristine sandy beaches of the Atlantic coast, just minutes away on foot.
experience_food_desc: Taste authentic Moroccan cuisine with a local family — from couscous to pastilla, every dish tells a story.
experience_sunset_desc: Watch the sun dip into the Atlantic from Asilah's ramparts — a golden hour you'll never forget.
testimonials_subtitle: Travelers from around the world share their experience
contact_subtitle: Send us a message and we'll get back to you shortly
contact_success: Thank you! We'll get back to you very soon.
